description: Create a Pareto analysis of bloodstream infections using the Epi Info 7 Visual Dashboard to identify the 'vital few' pathogens. Using the dataset 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiData\hospital_microbiology.csv', filter the records so the analysis only includes cases where the 'Source' is 'Blood'. Generate a Pareto Chart for the 'Organism' field. Save the resulting chart as an image to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiAnalysis\bsi_pareto.png' and save the dashboard canvas to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiAnalysis\bsi_dashboard.cvs7'.
